Package index

Data Handling

Create and manipulate SummarizedExperiment objects

top_variable_features()
Select top variable features

PCA Analysis

Run and analyze PCA

run_pca()
Run PCA on a SummarizedExperiment
pca_variance_explained()
Get variance explained by each PC

Visualization

Create plots

plot_pca()
Create a PCA scatter plot
plot_variance_explained()
Plot variance explained by principal components

Export

Save results to files

save_pca_results()
Save PCA results to files

Interactive App

Shiny web application

run_app()
Run the PCA Explorer Shiny Application
